name: She Knows Everything
overview: Mysterious cases take place at an apartment complex which is about to go under reconstruction. Lee Goong-Bok is a real estate agent that works with apartments there. She has a meddlesome type of personality. In Cheol-Ho is a veteran detective.

trailers.title: [She Knows EverythingㅣTeaser Trailer 2] “I didn’t kill her. It’s not me”
[She Knows EverythingㅣTeaser Trailer 1] ”What are you hiding from me?”
